top.name: Tectonic Shatter
top.rules_text: Destroy all Stone features within range 3 of target. Deal 5 damage per destroyed feature.

bottom.name: Elemental Cycle
bottom.rules_text: Randomly imbue tiles around the caster with fire, ice, storm, or stone.

upgrades.description: Tectonic Shatter deals more damage per feature. Elemental Cycle imbues a larger radius.

changes.value: Destroy all Stone features within range 3. Deal 7 damage per destroyed feature.
Randomly imbue tiles within 3 around the caster.

upgrades.description: Rubblemaster: Shattered stone features leave rubble behind, creating difficult terrain that persists.

changes.value: Destroy all Stone features within range 4. Deal 7 damage per feature. Rubble left behind.

upgrades.description: Convergence: Elemental Cycle now deals damage to enemies adjacent to the newly imbued tiles.

changes.value: Randomly imbue tiles within 3 with random elements. Deal 3 damage to adjacent enemies per tile imbued.

upgrades.description: Shockwave: Tectonic Shatter's shockwave also damages enemies within the radius, not just the target.

changes.value: Destroy Stone features within range 4. Deal 8 damage per feature to ALL enemies in range.
Randomly imbue tiles within 3. Deal 3 damage per tile. Gain 4 armor.

upgrades.description: Elemental Mastery: Elemental Cycle imbues with the element you have the highest attunement in, not randomly.

changes.value: Randomly imbue tiles within 3. Deal 4 damage per tile to adjacent enemies. Draw 1.

upgrades.description: Geological Disaster: Tectonic Shatter hits the entire board. Every stone feature shatters simultaneously.

changes.value: Destroy ALL Stone features on the board. Deal 10 damage per feature to nearest enemy.

upgrades.description: Elemental Singularity: The two halves of the card fuse. Shattering stone triggers an Elemental Cycle at each destroyed location.

changes.value: Destroy Stone features within range 5. Deal 9 damage per feature. Each destruction randomly imbues adjacent tiles.
Randomly imbue tiles within 4. Deal 5 damage per tile. Draw 1. Gain 1 mana.
